Im not sure if it will work for everyone, but get a files app such as ZArchiver -> then go to the Android folder (or whatever it may be on other devices) -> go to the data folder -> go to the com.HoYoverse.Nap folder -> go to the files folder -> find and delete vulkan_pso_cache.bin (if it was like mine there's probably a second vulkan so delete that too) and hopefully after that there shouldn't be as many frame drops.
